description: Add ticket comment editor paste handling for clipboard image MIME entries (`image/*`)
Trigger immediate upload for each pasted image before comment submission
Persist pasted images through the ticket document/file attachment pipeline
Apply deterministic filename convention for clipboard-uploaded images
Insert uploading placeholder state in BlockNote while clipboard image upload is in progress
Replace placeholder with attachment-backed image node after successful upload
Show upload failure UI with retry/remove action for pasted images
Persist comment content with attachment references instead of raw `data:image` payloads
Load and render attachment-backed image references in ticket comment stream via attachment-serving URLs
Enforce attachment authorization checks when rendering comment images
Map attachment-referenced comment images into outbound ticket-comment email image model
Generate CID inline attachments for outbound ticket-comment email images
Rewrite outbound email HTML image `src` values to matching CID references
Fallback outbound image rendering to attachment URL when CID generation cannot complete
Track clipboard-uploaded draft images in compose state so cancel flow can act on them
Prompt keep-vs-delete decision when canceling draft with clipboard-uploaded images
Implement hard delete action for selected clipboard draft images (object + metadata removal)
Prevent hard delete when artifact is already referenced by a saved comment or not deletable by requester
Validate accepted clipboard image MIME types and size constraints before upload
Ensure existing comment behavior (non-image paste and plain text) is unaffected by clipboard image support
Gate the clipboard image feature behind a dedicated flag for controlled rollout
Add server/client logging around upload outcomes, cancel-delete actions, and outbound CID generation paths
